description: NI (Narrative Intelligence) Content Library Manifest — Placeholder Edition. All content in this library represents framework-team-approved placeholder responses. In production, these are replaced with domain-expert-authored content through the NI Content API and governance approval gates.
content_philosophy: Every NI response must: (1) Never name, profile, or target individuals, (2) Explain the pattern, not the person, (3) Provide actionable organizational guidance, (4) Respect the humanity of the people involved. These are non-negotiable ethical constraints hardcoded into the delivery pipeline.

content_files.description: 18 placeholder NI calibration responses covering all 6 drift patterns across multiple domains, severity ranges, and organizational contexts
Templates for alert-level-specific escalation communications (Watch, Warning, Critical)
Templates for board-level summary reports with plain language drift explanations
